    "De-energize the circuit and lock out/tag out",

  "rationale": "An IR thermal signature indicating a hot spot at a termination point is a clear sign of high resistance caused by insufficient torque. This violates NEC 110.14(D) which mandates the use of a calibrated torque tool to ensure proper tightening torque, posing a severe fire and equipment failure hazard.",
